name: Umbral Arousaga
descrip: Powerful Erotic magic that arouses your target. Can Charm.
outcome: [AttackerName] lifts her palm towards [TargetName], generating a writhing mass of dark magic that she crushes in her claws before pulling her arm back, and then lunging it forward again palm open, sending a pulsing blast of purple magic that crackles through [TargetName]'s body in tingling waves, settling a warm heat into [TargetHisOrHer] waist.
miss: [AttackerName] lifts her palm towards [TargetName], generating a writhing mass of dark magic that she crushes in her claws before pulling her arm back, and then lunging it forward again palm open, sending a pulsing blast of purple magic that crackles through the air as [TargetName] narrowly avoids it!
statusOutcome: The spell leaves [TargetName]'s head spinning with sinfully sweet delight, flooding [TargetHisOrHer] body with aching desire, leaving [TargetHimOrHer] helplessly charmed with [AttackerName]!|f|CallCombatEventAndScene|/|VeneficaCombatEvents|/|UmbralArouseCurse|n|
